prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is S-103 Structural welding within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.1 Steel Erection. The observed field condition is: fillet undersized vs. callout (gauge in photo - ME). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors AWS D1.1. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T5 S-103 Measurement & estimation
